name: Instil Bio, Inc.
business: Instil Bio, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on identifying and advancing innovative therapeutic opportunities. It currently has no product candidates in active development and is actively seeking to in-license or acquire new therapeutic candidates. The company owns a facility in Tarzana, California that is leased to AstraZeneca.

exposures.sentence: We are actively seeking to in-license or acquire and develop additional novel therapeutic candidates in diseases with significant unmet medical need.
